body_transformation: The compact muscular body now features a soft pastel pink skin texture with delicate lavender undertones, replacing the dark brown stripes with intricate petal-like patterns in ivory white. The pale cream underbelly transitions to a smooth, luminous ivory with subtle starlight silver shimmer across its surface. The pointed tail tip retains its shape but now bears a delicate lavender petal at its end, while the short stubby legs gain soft rounded foot pads with a petal gold sheen. Small crystalline veins trace the original dark brown stripe paths on the back, glowing faintly with starlight silver light.
signature_feature: Tail tip: lavender petal with crystalline veins and starlight silver glow.
